description:
2025 Porsche Cayman GT4 RS, 4.0 F6, RWD, 493bhp, 7 Speed Auto. AED 659,000 or AED 10,324 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage Only 3,826 KM's - Porsche Warranty Valid Until February 2027 (Extendable) - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - GT Silver Metallic - Leather / Race Tex Interior - Clubsport Package - Sports Exhaust - Light Design Package - LED Headlights incl. Porsche Dynamic Light System Plus - Chrono Package - Door Pull Loops in Silver - Brake Calipers in Silver - Instrument Dials in White - Chrono Stopwatch Dial in White - Seat Belts in Black - Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) - Porsche Torque Vectoring (PTV) with Mechanically Locking Differential - 7-speed Porsche Doppelkupplung (PDK) - 20" 718 Cayman GT4 RS Forged Aluminum Wheels IN Satin Neodyme - Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) (Lowered 10 mm) - Navigation Module for Porsche Communication Management (PCM) - Steering Wheel with 12 O'Clock Marker - Voice Control - PDK Gear Selector in Leather - Carbon Fiber Interior Trim - Door-Sill Guards in Carbon Fiber
